name: Patriotic Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the red layer, dissolve strawberry gelatin in 1 1/3 cups boiling water. Add thawed strawberries. Stir gently until the fruit thaws and separates. Chill until thickened. Pour into a 9-cup Bundt® pan. Chill until set, but not firm.
2. To prepare the white layer, dissolve lemon gelatin in 1 cup boiling water. Blend in ice cream, beating until smooth. Chill until thickened. Spoon over the strawberry mixture in the pan. Chill until set, but not firm.
3. Meanwhile, to prepare the blue layer, dissolve remaining lemon gelatin and sugar in 1 cup boiling water. Add cold water. Chill until thickened. Stir in thawed blueberries and spoon over the lemon ice cream mixture. Chill until firm, or overnight.
4. Unmold and serve.
